description: Reading a property of null/undefined throws a catchable TypeError with the Node-shaped message (Cannot read properties of null/undefined (reading 'x')) via a centralized _object_get_ic guard; missing props on real objects/strings/arrays still return undefined without throwing.

expect.stdout:
true TypeError Cannot read properties of null (reading 'foo')
true TypeError Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'bar')
Cannot read properties of null (reading 'baz')
1 undefined
3 undefined
2 undefined
done
